content:
After + V-ing

'After' ဆိုတာ 'ပြီးတဲ့အခါ' လို့ အဓိပ္ပာယ်ရပါတယ်။ 'After' နောက်မှာ Verb ရှိရင် အမြဲတမ်း 'ing' တပ်ပေးရပါတယ်။

Structure/Formula: After + V-ing + Object/Extension

👉 He finished his homework and then he played football. → After finishing his homework, he played football.

👉 She woke up and then she brushed her teeth. → After waking up, she brushed her teeth.

👉 They ate dinner and then they watched TV. → After eating dinner, they watched TV.

👉 The students cleaned the classroom carefully and then they went back home. → After cleaning the classroom carefully, the students went back home.

🔑 Key Points:

  • 'After' နောက်မှာ Verb သုံးရင် 'ing' (V-ing) သေချာတပ်ပါ။
  • အဖြစ်များတဲ့ V-ing ပုံစံများ - going, doing, eating, finishing, waking.

⚠️ Common Mistakes:

  • 'After' နောက်မှာ Verb အစား V-ing မတပ်မိပါစေနဲ့။ (ဥပမာ - After finish ❌ → After finishing ✅)
